parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ id: $json.session_id, ip_hash: $json.ipHash, consent_given: true, last_activity: new Date().toISOString() }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify([ { session_id: $json.session_id, role: 'user', content: $json.user_message }, { session_id: $json.session_id, role: 'assistant', content: $json.reply } ]) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ session_id: $json.session_id, name: $json.lead_data ? $json.lead_data.name : null, email: $json.lead_data ? $json.lead_data.email : null, phone: $json.lead_data ? $json.lead_data.phone : null, interest: $json.lead_data ? $json.lead_data.interest : null }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ reply: $json.reply, session_id: $json.session_id, suggested_actions: [], lead_form: $json.has_lead_data ? { show: true, fields: ['name', 'email', 'phone'] } : null }) }}
